title: Silky Nutty Thai Egg Yolk Curry
description: A comforting Thai-inspired curry that blends silky egg yolks with nutty cashews and aromatic spices, perfect for a cozy meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat until warm.
Add green curry paste and stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in remaining coconut milk, fish sauce, and lime juice; bring to a gentle simmer.
Add sliced bell pepper and bamboo shoots; cook for 3 minutes until slightly tender.
Reduce heat to low, stir in roasted cashews and cooked brown rice; heat through for 2 minutes.
Turn off the heat and whisk in the egg yolks one at a time, ensuring a smooth, silky consistency.
Return the pan to low heat and simmer for 1-2 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Add basil leaves, season with salt and pepper, and stir to combine.
Transfer the curry to serving bowls; garnish with extra cashews or basil if desired.
Serve immediately and enjoy the comforting flavors.
